title: Quadlet - add support for UID and GID Mapping
body:
Support UIDMap, GIDMap, SubUIDMap and SubGIDMap
If any of them are set disregard the deprecated Remap keys Add tests and man

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - add support for UIDMap, GIDMap, SubUIDMap and SubGIDMap in .container files
```

Resolves: #20619
